title: FalsePatternLib
description: A 1.7.10 library containing useful and backported code for mods to use
body:
A library for 1.7.10 with lots of useful stuff, primarily used by my own mods.

For a full documentation on the latest utilities and APIs contained in this library, please refer to the readme file on the project's github: https://github.com/FalsePattern/FalsePatternLib/blob/master/README.MD
